<?php namespace Illuminate\Console\View\Components; use Symfony\Component\Console\Output\OutputInterface; class Error extends Component { /** * Renders the component using the given arguments. * * @param string $string * @param int $verbosity * @return void */ public function render($string, $verbosity = OutputInterface::VERBOSITY_NORMAL) { (new Line($this->output))->render('error', $string, $verbosity); } }
